_note: Label Sprint round for anther — generated anther_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the anther cross-section.

hotspots.label: Epidermis
hotspots.detail: The outer protective layer of the anther.

hotspots.label: Endothecium
hotspots.detail: A fibrous layer just inside the epidermis that helps the anther split open.

hotspots.label: Tapetum
hotspots.detail: The innermost nutritive layer surrounding the pollen sac; nourishes developing pollen.

hotspots.label: Pollen grain
hotspots.detail: A microspore developing inside the pollen sac.
